assessment_items.question_content:
**Order the lines from tallest to shortest.**  
*Put the tallest line on the left.*
 
[[☃ sorter 1]]
hints: Drag the tallest line all the way to the left.
Now drag the rest of the lines into place.

These lines are in order from tallest to shortest:

![3 vertical lines. The tallest line is first, the second tallest line is second, the shortest line is third.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ec74b0c035824f72a7c91f593e322bfc.png)

correct: ![A vertical line that is the 2nd tallest line.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f12e8cd78a7a4ae87269ee4700817cc9.png)
![A vertical line that is the tallest line.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d06f4ccc83cbada19157e1cbd0f102cf.png)
![A vertical line that is the shortest line.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/561e50743932b1fb798524f39daaf077.png)
